name: The Nurse
specialText: Once per Run restore 1 additional Drive when using any restore item.

name: The Convict
specialText: Once per Run reveal cost of one people event before deciding to spend resources.

name: The Librarian
specialText: Starts each Run with S03 (look ahead item) guaranteed in loadout draft.

name: The Backpacker
specialText: Zero slot items cost nothing to carry and are never randomly discarded by Misery.

name: The Boxer
specialText: Drive restoration from all sources reduced by 1, minimum 0.

name: The Prepper
specialText: Sees 8 Starting Loadout cards instead of 5 when drafting.

name: The National Guardsman
specialText: Once per Run reduce one hazard event cost by 2.
